evals.name: prd-extraction
evals.prompt: Extract the key architectural information from the following PRD: 'We are building a SaaS task management platform. Users can create projects, assign tasks, and track progress. The system must support 10,000 concurrent users, integrate with Slack and GitHub, and provide a REST API for third-party integrations. Data must be persisted in a relational database with full audit logging.'
expectations: Should extract core features: projects, tasks, progress tracking
Should extract the scalability NFR (10,000 concurrent users)
Should extract Slack and GitHub integrations
Should extract relational DB and audit logging requirements

evals.name: output-format-compliance
evals.prompt: Generate a complete architecture document skeleton for the task management SaaS platform. The output must follow the standard architecture document template format.
expectations: Output must be valid markdown with H1/H2 headings
Document must have a clear H1 title related to the system
Overview section should appear before Modules section
Main sections should be H2, sub-sections should be H3
Document should include version/date metadata at the top
